description: Sector overlay for pharmaceutical manufacturing, importation, distribution, pharmacy practice, product registration, GMP, traceability, and regulated drug documentation in Nigeria.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay controls for Pharmaceuticals. Intended to be used with nigeria_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Nigerian legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: NAFDAC gazetted regulations, including pharmaceutical products regulations

rules.title: NAFDAC product registration or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NAFDAC registration number, product approval, listing, import permit, or regulated-product authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Nigerian compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, sector context, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: GMP or quality-system evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for GMP, quality assurance, quality control, validation, batch release, or deviation/CAPA evidence.

rules.title: Pharmaceutical traceability evidence is present
